case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. ESMERALDO MADAMBA

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MADAMBA, ESMERALDO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADAMBA, ESMERALDO $6,718.75 PRINCIPAL, $1,492.85 INTEREST, $295.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,506.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MADAMBA, ESMERALDO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-13-2011
